overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a slow walk through a dark rural farm area at night. The player approaches a wooden barn structure along a dirt path flanked by tall grass, with a flashlight illuminating the immediate ground ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along a dirt path toward a wooden barn, flashlight illuminating the tall grass and path ahead

entered.detail: tall leafy tree with dense foliage leaning over the left side of the path
large traditional wooden barn with sloped roof and external diagonal support beams
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a dirt path through tall grass at night. A large tree stands prominently on the left while a wooden barn structure is visible ahead on the right. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, creating a focused pool of light on the path ahead.

events.description: wooden picket fence becomes visible on the left side as the tree passes out of view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path, moving closer to the barn structure

entered.detail: low wooden fence with vertical slats running parallel to the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large tree, the camera continues toward the barn which now appears closer and more detailed on the right. A wooden picket fence becomes visible on the left side of the path, defining the boundary of the farmyard area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark rural path that gradually closes in on a farmyard structure. It begins with a walk through tall grass at night, where a flashlight casts a focused pool of light on the dirt path as a large tree looms on the left. As the camera passes the tree, the perspective shifts forward, bringing the wooden barn on the right into closer and more detailed view. The scene then expands to reveal a wooden picket fence appearing on the left, defining the boundary of the farmyard as the camera continues its approach toward the building.
